mano_cua.result_summary: mint-ui demo应用因vue-hot-reload-api与Vue版本不兼容而无法启动。TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading _lifecycleHooks)导致Vue应用挂载失败，#app innerHTML为空，页面完全空白。尝试降级vue-hot-reload-api(2.3.0)和Vue(2.6.14)均未解决。所有mint-ui任务均受影响，无法测试目标功能
mano_cua.last_reasoning: mint-ui demo app fails to start due to vue-hot-reload-api incompatibility with Vue. TypeError at exports.install: _lifecycleHooks is undefined. Vue app mount fails, #app innerHTML is empty string, page is completely blank. Tried downgrading vue-hot-reload-api and Vue versions without success.
